Hero.title: Find calm in your day
Hero.subtitle: Zen Coach helps you breathe, reset, and build gentle routines—right on your phone, at your own pace.
Hero.note: Available on iPhone and Android · A few minutes are enough.
Hero.mainScreenAlt: Zen Coach screenshot — choose your breathing exercise

Benefits.title: What Zen Coach gives you
Benefits.lead: Designed to be useful, soft, and realistic—not to overwhelm you.

one.title: Calm in minutes
one.text: Short exercises to soften tension and widen your breath—wherever you are.

two.title: Routines that fit you
two.text: Bring well-being into your week without rigidity—optional quiet reminders.

three.title: Simple guidance
three.text: A clear interface without jargon—you don’t need to be a meditation expert.

four.title: Privacy & autonomy
four.text: Core use doesn’t require an account on our servers; preferences stay on your device first.

Showcase.title: A glimpse of the in-app experience
Showcase.lead: The same calm UI and soft effects as on mobile—guided sessions, daily quote, settings.

a.title: Guided sessions
a.text: Follow the rhythm without timing in your head—ideal when your mind is full.

b.title: Content to inspire
b.text: Quotes and anchors to pause and widen perspective.

c.title: Habits that stick
c.text: Repeatable gestures that fit a busy life.

How.title: How it works
How.lead: Three simple steps to start without friction.

1.title: Install Zen Coach
1.text: Download from the App Store or Google Play and open it whenever you need—morning, break, or evening.

2.title: Choose an intention
2.text: Breathing, a short pause, or a routine—pick what fits the moment.

3.title: Come back when you want
3.text: No daily score—Zen Coach supports you without grading you.

Pricing.title: Free & premium
Pricing.lead: A clear model: start free, go deeper if it fits.

free.title: Free
free.desc: Core access to discover Zen Coach and build the habit of pausing.
free.b2: Full experience to try without a card
free.b3: Upgrade to premium when you decide

premium.title: Premium
premium.desc: Go further with features unlocked via the App Store or Google Play.
premium.b2: In-app purchases handled by Apple or Google depending on your device
premium.b3: Manage subscriptions in your App Store or Google account settings

Pricing.footnote: Payments and subscriptions go through the official stores (Apple / Google). Legal notices and privacy policy are in the footer.

Philosophy.quote: Well-being isn’t a performance—it’s a kinder way to live your day.

FinalCta.title: Ready for a pause that matters?
FinalCta.text: Install Zen Coach on iPhone or Android and give yourself a simple ritual—today, or whenever you need it.

Contact.footerTagline: Mobile app for guided breathing and well-being.
